inputs.text: Main thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar bhi hai aur sir dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid typically presents with more severe symptoms, but early stages can be non-specific

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi hai aur kabz ki shikayat hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever can still be viral in nature, but abdominal symptoms suggest gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Constipation can be a symptom of typhoid, but other symptoms are not yet specific enough

inputs.text: Ab mere tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho rahi hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea can occur in gastroenteritis, but other symptoms are more suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever and weakness, but other symptoms do not fit as well as typhoid

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar bhi abhi tak hai aur pet dard bhi badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged fever, abdominal pain, and exhaustion are consistent with typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of response to treatment and worsening symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of characteristic symptoms and lack of response to antimalarial treatment
